title: THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: EMERGENCE EUGENE THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Intensive outpatient program. Individual and family therapy sessions available weekly as needed. Individualized treatment plans and therapy. Issues addressed include substance use disorders, domestic violence issues, self-esteem, assertiveness, sexuality, body image, nutrition, eating disorders, relationships, grief and loss, parenting and childcare issues, HIV/AIDS, sexual abuse, addiction in the family, relapse, recovery and spirituality 78 Centennial Loop Suite A Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 393-0777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 393-0777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: OHP, sliding scale DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 2 blocks from LTD bus stop on MLK Jr Boulevard Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DISCOVERY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE EUGENE
